title: Life Sense
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{ForcePower |image= |name=Life Sense |alternate= |alignment= |area=Sense[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] |purpose=Sense presence, health, and identity of individuals |inventor= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|He is here…''"
"''Obi-Wan Kenobi! What makes you think so?''"
"''A tremor in the Force. The last time I felt it was in the presence of my old master.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]|}} '''Life Sense''' was a [[Force power/Legends#Sense|Sense]]-based [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] which allowed [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] to sense the life force of a target they were searching for. The Force user was able to determine his target's presence and identity, as well as their physical condition, such as wounds or illness. Life Sense could also be used to detect whether a Force-user was in a [[Hibernation trance/Legends|Hibernation trance]]. ==Appearances== {{IncompleteList}} *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''
